# platformCreateFunctionGraph

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformCreateFunctionGraph mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.platformCreateFunctionGraph({ input: '<PlatformCreateFunctionGraphInput>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run platformCreateFunctionGraph

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.platformCreateFunctionGraph({ input: '<PlatformCreateFunctionGraphInput>' }).execute();
```
